chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 861 of 2015 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 27-01-2021 Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner No.1 Imdad Hussain is present in person, whereas, his counsel is called absent. Ghulam Shabbir Sahto, Mukhtiarkar, Taluka Sobhodero is present and files para wise comments for self and on behalf of Assistant Commissioner, Sobhodero, which are taken on record; copy whereof has been provided to the petitioner, who is present in Court. Para No.4 of the said comments reflects as under: “As per direction of Senior Member Board of Revenue Sindh Hyderabad contained in recent letter No.08/R.C/ 2020/Rev:-I(II)/371 Hyderabad dated 18-03-2020 the answering respondents No.03 and 04 are not presently authorized for reconstruction of record of rights and petitioner who have still not yet got his entry in VF-VII-A may prefer a proper appeal with documentary proof before the Deputy Commissioner Khairpur passing of Judicial order for keeping entry of ownership in the record.” In view of above, petitioner is directed to file an appeal along with documentary proof before the Deputy Commissioner, Khairpur, who shall pass a judicial order as per aforesaid notification under compliance report through Additional Registrar of this Court. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
